_note: Fictional market deal feed. 15 invented announcements over the past 6 weeks. Helpful for client intel / deal-tracker use cases. None of these deals are real.

deals.headline: Tessera Capital backs £140m bolt-on for portfolio company Brimstone Cloud
deals.advisors: Buyer: Nairo; Target: Holloway Mead LLP
deals.summary: Tessera-backed Brimstone Cloud has acquired UK SaaS data-ops business Verdant for £140m. Deal pipeline activity in mid-market UK SaaS continues to accelerate.

deals.headline: Helix Therapeutics raises $185m Series C, valuation reportedly $1.1bn
deals.buyer: Atlas Crossover Partners (lead) and existing investors
deals.summary: Cambridge-based Helix has closed a $185m Series C led by US crossover investor Atlas. Proceeds to fund Phase III oncology trials.

deals.headline: Northwind Industries appoints advisors for sale process
deals.advisors: Northwind: Nairo; Sponsor candidates not yet engaged
deals.summary: Birmingham-based mid-market manufacturer Northwind has appointed advisors for an auction process. PE interest expected.

deals.headline: Brindle Foods to spin off challenger frozen-foods division
deals.target: Brindle Frozen (carve-out from Brindle Foods plc)
deals.summary: Listed FMCG group plans to demerge its frozen-foods business via a Main Market admission later in 2026.

deals.headline: Cobalt Energy completes £180m senior facility refinancing
deals.advisors: Cobalt: Nairo; Lenders: Allen Overy Shearman Sterling-equivalent
deals.summary: PE-backed North Sea energy group has refinanced its senior debt with a three-bank club at improved margins.

deals.headline: Lattice Networks raises £62m Series B at £210m valuation
deals.summary: Manchester-based AI infrastructure scale-up Lattice has closed a Series B led by a UK-based growth fund.

deals.headline: Albion Retail reports flat sales but signals new flagship investment
deals.summary: Listed retailer announces flat YoY sales but new lease commitment on Oxford Street flagship.

deals.headline: Marston Pharmaceuticals signs IPR licence with US biotech (oncology asset)
deals.advisors: Marston: Nairo; US biotech: Holloway Mead LLP
deals.summary: Marston has licensed in a Phase II oncology asset from a US biotech for upfront $25m plus milestones.

deals.headline: Pemberton Construction settles £18m HS3 dispute via adjudication
deals.summary: Adjudicator awards £18m on prolongation and disruption claim.

deals.headline: Saxon & Reed Insurance under FCA s166 - 'final report imminent'
deals.summary: Listed insurer's skilled-person review nears completion with final report expected Q3 2026.

deals.headline: Westgate acquires Hammersmith office for £24m
deals.summary: Westgate has acquired a 1980s Hammersmith office building, expected to be converted to residential under Class MA.

deals.headline: Quill Media restructures podcast division
deals.summary: London-based media group restructures its podcast division following adverse publicity over a former contributor.

deals.headline: Mercer Coaching raises seed round of £3.4m
deals.buyer: Various angel investors and a UK seed fund
deals.summary: Edinburgh-based sport coaching platform raises seed round.

deals.headline: Kingfisher Logistics announces depot closures, c.140 redundancies
deals.summary: Mid-market logistics group consults on closure of two regional depots.

deals.headline: Tessera-backed bid for UK water utility 'no longer being pursued'
deals.summary: PE consortium led by Tessera has withdrawn from a £1.1bn bid for a UK regional water utility.
